criteria.reason: The disabled executor service reuses preflight and always returns a blocked execution result while runtime is disabled.
The execute endpoint is authenticated and business-scoped.
Blocked execution attempts are written to the Operator audit trail.
The Operator dashboard can call execute and render the structured blocked result.
No paid, external, AI, parsequeue, credit, or provider write path was introduced.

commands_run: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_paid_executor.py src/services/operator_paid_preflight.py src/services/operator_audit.py src/api/operator_api.py

python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
